title: Online Docs View questions
excerpt:
I use the Online Docs as a center for all of our employees to use as a resource library, I named it “How to do anything” within it I have step by step instructions by excel sheets, videos, word docs, you name it. 
Howeve…

posts.author: Johnsa9 (Ashley Morrison)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use the Online Docs as a center for all of our employees to use as a resource library, I named it “How to do anything” within it I have step by step instructions by excel sheets, videos, word docs, you name it.
However… I only have 11 links embedded and usually when you open the view the [EMBED HERE] page shows up.
Now it does not, the first thing that pops up is the first link in the list.
Is there a max amount of links you can add or is there a glitch in my docs? or does anybody know of another way to create a “How to library” accessible to all Workspace users?

posts.author: charlottes (Charlotte Siverson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Johnsa9,

Sorry to hear you are facing some confusion here! I’m not sure I fully understand the issue you are facing here. Could you please write into support@monday.com with screenshot so they can help you accordingly? Thanks!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
